Name: Luv Is Rage 2 [V2]
Music Videos

XO TOUR Llif3
(prod. TM88 & JW Lucas)
(All My Friends Are Dead, XO Tour, P1)
Notes: Music video for "XO Tour Llif3". Directed by Virgil Abloh, who also played a role in the video. Filmed mostly in Paris during The Weeknd's StarBoy: Legend of the Fall Tour when Uzi was the opening act of the European leg. Features cameos from The Weeknd, NAV, Ike Beatz, and Spike Jordan. The video was very controversial due to the graphic and satanic scenes paired with the dark imagery shown throughout the video. The Arabic subtitles present in the video also faced backlash because it translated to gibberish and was only put in because the co-director thought it looked cool. Despite the heavy critism, the music video stands as one of if not the most iconic pieces of media in Uzi's career.
